nodes.label: AI as creative compass for idea sorting
nodes.label_negative: AI as source of ready-made ideas
nodes.grounding_span: I find myself asking AI for help when I have too many ideas running and need help sorting them into one

nodes.label: AI as validation tool for creative instincts
nodes.label_negative: AI as replacement for personal judgment
nodes.grounding_span: I used AI to confirm that it would be possible to mix these genres

nodes.label: AI as aid for overcoming creative block
nodes.label_negative: AI as crutch that bypasses personal effort
nodes.grounding_span: It made my process flow smoother because I sort of hit a wall and couldn't really find the right words

nodes.label: Preserving personal authenticity in music
nodes.label_negative: AI-generated music devoid of human experience
nodes.grounding_span: I try not to use it much because I think it's important to be very personal in music

nodes.label: AI as limited aid not creative replacement
nodes.label_negative: AI as full generator of beats or lyrics
nodes.grounding_span: I would like to think I'd keep my stance with not overusing it and only trying to use it as an aid rather than something to completely generate beats or lyrics

nodes.label: Creative flow and productivity
nodes.grounding_span: It made my process flow smoother

nodes.label: Personal authenticity and human expression
nodes.grounding_span: Music and art are something that is so human and personal

nodes.label: Positive reliance on AI for idea organization
nodes.grounding_span: I find myself asking AI for help when I have too many ideas running and need help sorting them into one

nodes.label: Confidence boost from AI validation
nodes.grounding_span: It made me feel more confident in what I thought were 'chaotic ideas'

nodes.label: Fear of losing human element in music
nodes.grounding_span: I am worried that AI will start to generate music and that people will start to lose that personal aspect

nodes.label: Intentional restraint to preserve authenticity
nodes.grounding_span: I try not to use it much because I think it's important to be very personal in music

nodes.label: Idea clustering and synthesis — combines multiple ideas into coherent output
nodes.grounding_span: I had many ideas going for a song, and I used AI to confirm that it would be possible to mix these genres

nodes.label: Value-driven boundary setting — limits AI use to preserve personal authenticity
nodes.grounding_span: I try not to use it much because I think it's important to be very personal in music
